summary: Added DEBUG-guarded logging to empty catch blocks in PatternExtractor to surface parse errors
notes: Fixed 3 empty catch blocks (lines ~597, 611, 623) that were silently swallowing JSON parse errors during session message extraction. Now logs under DEBUG env var: if (process.env.DEBUG) console.warn('[PatternExtractor] parse error (skipped):', err.message). All 8 learning-engine tests pass. No logic changes, only error visibility improvement.
